name: Kushim, Inc.
summary: Kushim, Inc. provides learning solutions in Japan. It offers e-learning solutions, such as Smart Learning Accelerator Platform (SLAP), an e-learning system; iStudy LMS for e-learning, training management, learning management, content management, group training management, skill management, etc; e-content services that offers skill acquisition through e-learning, such as AI, blockchain, IoT, new business development, etc.; millvi, a cloud-based video distribution system; and studio services, including video shooting and editing. The company also provides training in the field of IT human resource development and production; system engineering services; security consultation; education instructor dispatch services; virtual shareholders' meeting support; contract research and system contract development; and consulting services. The company was formerly known as iStudy Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kushim, Inc. in April 2020. Kushim, Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
